GALEX

Welcome to HST search. For help getting started, visit the Mission Search Guide. Remember using the retired HST form? Side-by-side comparisons of both forms are available on the Basic Search Page.

This form is a filter — press SEARCH immediately to return all Hubble observations, or enter values to focus your results.

Object name(s) and/or RA and Dec pair(s)
Object(s)=
Search radius (max: 30 arcminutes)
Radius=
Unit=
Data Types=
Observations=
Active Instruments=
Legacy Instruments=
Dataset ID, e.g. ICDM79040  
Dataset ID=
Program (Proposal) ID associated with observation, e.g. 14657
Program ID=
Principal Investigator surname
PI Surname=
Exposure duration in seconds, e.g. 1200
Exposure Time=
Names of Filters/Gratings, e.g. G130M or POL60UV;PR200L
Filter / Grating=
Find data with observations beginning between these dates
Obs Start Date=
to
Obs Start Date=
Find observations released publicly on or between these dates
Release Date=
to
Release Date=
Add or remove additional conditions to filter results
Column Name=
Condition=
Choose fields to display in search results table.
Output columns=
